description: A video of a woman being brutally assaulted by her railway-retired father-in-law in Kanpur has gone viral. The victim alleges dowry harassment and severe physical abuse, including clothes being torn and attacks on private parts. Police have registered an FIR and made one arrest after the incident.

title: Kerala woman ‘sexually harassed’ on way to hospital after accident
description: A woman injured in an accident in Kayamkulam has filed a complaint alleging sexual harassment by a man who helped shift her to the hospital. The accused was questioned and released, prompting the victim to claim lapses in the investigation. State police chief has sought a detailed report and an internal probe is underway.
